sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) PT Lowered to $55 at Citi
feed.summary: Citi analyst Steven Zaccone has lowered the price target for Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) to $55. The article states that this is a premium content piece and requires a subscription to StreetInsider.com Premium to read the full details.

feed.title: ROLLINS, INC. SCHEDULES DATE FOR RELEASE OF FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS
feed.summary: Rollins, Inc. announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results after market close on Wednesday, April 22, 2026. The company will also host a conference call on Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time, to discuss the results. Interested parties can access the call via phone or live webcast on the company's investor relations website, with a replay available for 180 days.

feed.title: Arista Networks to Announce Q1 2026 Financial Results on Tuesday, May 5, 2026
feed.summary: Arista Networks (NYSE: ANET) will release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, after U.S. markets close, followed by a conference call. The company also announced its participation in several upcoming investor events in May and June 2026, including the Needham Technology, Media & Consumer Conference, J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference, William Blair 46th Annual Growth Stock Conference, and Bank of America Global Technology Conference.

feed.title: XPO Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call for Thursday, April 30, 2026
feed.summary: XPO (NYSE: XPO) has announced its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call and webcast will take place on Thursday, April 30, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. The company's financial results will be released earlier that morning and will be accessible on its website. A replay of the call will be available until May 30, 2026.

feed.title: Kroger Begins Earth Month Campaign To Benefit World Wildlife Fund
feed.summary: Kroger has launched an Earth Month campaign encouraging customers to round up their purchases at checkout to benefit the World Wildlife Fund's conservation efforts. The Kroger Co. Zero Hunger | Zero Waste Foundation will match customer donations up to $50,000. Additionally, Kroger divisions are undertaking various local initiatives, such as tree planting, community cleanups, food rescue pilot programs, and vendor collaborations focused on regenerative farming.

feed.title: EPAM Announces Date for First Quarter Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM) will host a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss its first quarter 2026 financial results. A news release with these results will be issued before the call. The live webcast will be available on EPAM's website, with a replay also accessible for those unable to attend live.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Raises Coca-Cola (KO) Target, Flags CPG Pressures and Demand Risks
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has increased its price target for The Coca-Cola Company (NYSE:KO) to $86 from $83, reiterating a Buy rating, despite acknowledging pressures in the consumer packaged goods industry due to geopolitical conflicts, inflation, and currency risks. Concurrently, Coca-Cola has launched a new marketing campaign to boost soda sales in restaurants, a crucial "away-from-home" segment that accounts for roughly half of its revenue. This initiative aims to combat declining restaurant traffic and spending by partnering with 13 chains.

feed.title: EPAM will post first-quarter results before an 8 a.m. ET May 7 call
feed.summary: EPAM (NYSE: EPAM) has announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results and host a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. ET. A news release with the results will be issued prior to the call, and a live webcast will be available on the company's investor relations website, with a replay also available for those unable to attend live. Historically, similar earnings date announcements have seen a modest negative stock movement.

feed.title: From Avocado Oil to YumYum: Hidden Valley® Ranch Answers Modern Consumer Cravings with Three New Flavors
feed.summary: Hidden Valley Ranch has launched three new flavor innovations: Hidden Valley Ranch with Avocado Oil, YumYum Ranch, and Parmesan Ranch Seasoning. These new products aim to meet diverse consumer tastes, offering a mix of new ingredients and bold, restaurant-inspired flavors for various culinary applications. The new line is now available nationwide, with YumYum Ranch exclusively at Walmart.

feed.title: OVG lands naming rights deal for under-construction Mobile arena
feed.summary: Oak View Group (OVG) has secured a naming rights deal with Regions Bank for the upcoming 10,000-seat, $237 million arena in Mobile, Alabama. The venue, set to open in early 2027, will be named Regions Arena. This partnership also designates Regions Bank as the official banking sponsor for the arena, the Mobile Convention Center, Saenger Theater, and the new Mobile Hockey Team.

feed.title: Wheaton Precious Metals Files Form 6-K, Integrates 2025 Annual Report Into U.S. Registrations
feed.summary: Wheaton Precious Metals (TSE:WPM) has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. SEC, incorporating its 2025 Annual Report into existing U.S. registration statements. This action ensures compliance with U.S. reporting requirements and maintains transparency for investors without signifying immediate operational changes. Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, rates WPM as "Outperform" due to its profitability and strong balance sheet, despite a premium valuation and variable free cash flow.

feed.title: Fired worker sues Ecolab, alleges racial bias behind safety violations
feed.summary: A former Ecolab production worker, Jamaal Watts, is suing the company for racial discrimination, alleging he was fired over safety violations that were either not his fault or for which white co-workers received no punishment. The lawsuit details three incidents, including a product-loading accident and a chemical spill, where Watts claims he was unfairly disciplined while others involved, who were white, were not. Watts also alleges he faced discriminatory speech and witnessed unreported safety issues by Caucasian employees, highlighting a recurring risk for HR professionals regarding uneven safety-related discipline along racial lines.

feed.title: Tower Company SBA Mulling Sale: Report
feed.summary: SBA Communications, the third-largest public tower company in the U.S., is reportedly considering a potential sale after receiving takeover interest. Industry analysts suggest that infrastructure funds, seeking stable returns, or even private tower company Vertical Bridge, could be potential buyers due to the predictable cash flows and growth in wireless traffic in the tower leasing business. The company's stock was recently down but had seen a significant rise since Thursday morning, indicating market interest.

feed.title: UBS Raises Coca-Cola (KO) Price Target to $90, Maintains Buy Rat
feed.summary: UBS has reaffirmed its "Buy" rating for Coca-Cola (KO) and increased its price target from $87.00 to $90.00, signaling continued confidence in the company's market performance. This adjustment follows several other banks that have also recently raised their price targets for Coca-Cola. Despite a Wall Street analyst average target predicting a 10.38% upside, GuruFocus estimates a slight downside based on its fair value calculations.

feed.title: UBS Lowers Price Target for Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP) to $32 While Maintaining Buy Rating | KDP Stock News
feed.summary: UBS has re-evaluated Keurig Dr Pepper (KDP), lowering its price target from $36 to $32 while upholding a "Buy" rating. This adjustment reflects a mixed landscape of recent analyst actions, though the consistent "Buy" rating signals a positive long-term outlook for the company. Keurig Dr Pepper is poised for significant changes with the anticipated acquisition of JDE Peet's and a subsequent split into two US-listed entities.

feed.title: Deere announces $99 million settlement in Right to Repair lawsuit
feed.summary: John Deere has reached a $99 million settlement in a class-action lawsuit concerning restrictions on equipment repair, agreeing to reimburse farmers and make repair tools available for 10 years. While the financial penalty is relatively small compared to estimated annual costs to farmers, the agreement aims to improve farmers' ability to diagnose and fix their machinery independently. The company still faces an ongoing 2025 lawsuit from the Federal Trade Commission regarding its repair restrictions.

feed.title: Former AT&T director alleges return-to-office mandate drove out older workers
feed.summary: A former AT&T director, Lorraine Lopez, has filed a lawsuit alleging that AT&T used its return-to-office mandate, specifically the "How and Where We Work" initiative, to force out older managers. Lopez claims she was terminated at age 58 despite a top performance review, while younger employees received preferential treatment regarding work locations and relocation support. The lawsuit also references previous age discrimination claims against AT&T.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) Price Target Cut to $23.00 by Analysts at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) to $23.00 from $25.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock. This projection suggests a potential downside of 1.10% from the current trading price. The broader market consensus for KHC remains "Reduce" with an average target price of $23.59, influenced by mixed analyst ratings including one Strong Buy, fourteen Holds, and five Sells.

feed.title: UBS Lowers Price Target for Clorox (CLX) to $110 | CLX Stock New
feed.summary: UBS has lowered its price target for Clorox (CLX) to $110 from $121, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst varied analyst actions for Clorox in recent months, including other target raises and cuts from firms like Deutsche Bank, Morgan Stanley, and Evercore ISI Group. The average target price from 16 analysts is $122.89, indicating a potential upside of 19.40% from its current price, with a consensus "Hold" rating.

feed.title: UBS Maintains Neutral Rating for CHD, Lowers Price Target to $98
feed.summary: UBS analyst Peter Grom has reiterated a Neutral rating for Church & Dwight Co (CHD) but lowered its price target from $102 to $98. This adjustment reflects UBS's market projections, as the company, known for its Arm & Hammer brand and other consumer products, continues to expand its portfolio. Despite the lowered target, analysts' average forecast for CHD remains optimistic, with a projected upside from its current price.

feed.title: Walmart Website Now Accepts CareCredit for Health and Wellness Products
feed.summary: Synchrony's CareCredit credit card can now be used to purchase select health and wellness products on Walmart.com, expanding its existing acceptance in Walmart and Sam's Club stores. This integration allows online payments for categories like medical supplies, fitness equipment, and sleep essentials, with options for home delivery and in-store pickup. The move reflects Synchrony's commitment to providing credit options for health and wellness by connecting consumers with retailers.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley raises AstraZeneca stock price target on pipeline progress
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for AstraZeneca (NASDAQ:AZN) shares to $220 from $219, maintaining an Overweight rating, citing positive pipeline developments and foreign exchange updates. This adjustment comes ahead of AstraZeneca's first-quarter 2026 results, with Morgan Stanley forecasting sales and earnings per share slightly above consensus due to strong performance in Oncology and cardiovascular, renal, and metabolism products. The company also highlighted recent positive Phase III trial results for Imfinzi, Imjudo, efzimfotase alfa, and tozorakimab.

feed.title: Travelers' Insurance CLO Got Million-Dollar Pay Raise In 2025
feed.summary: The Travelers Cos. Inc.'s Chief Legal Officer received nearly $8.5 million in total compensation in 2025, marking an increase of almost $1 million compared to 2024. This information was disclosed in a recent securities filing. The article highlights compensation trends for in-house counsel, referencing related reports on other company executives' pay.

feed.title: Hit the Jackpot on Your Next Las Vegas Vacation
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International has launched a new all-inclusive vacation experience at Luxor Hotel & Casino and Excalibur Hotel & Casino, starting at $330 plus tax for two people for two nights. This package aims to offer a convenient and affordable way to enjoy Las Vegas by bundling accommodations, meals, entertainment, shows, attractions, resort fees, and parking into a single price. The initiative responds to traveler demand for simplified and value-driven vacation planning in the popular destination.

feed.title: Tapestry Appoints Pinterest CTO Matt Madrigal To Board Of Directors
feed.summary: Tapestry has appointed Matt Madrigal, CTO of Pinterest, to its Board of Directors, expanding the board to 11 members. Madrigal's expertise in technology, e-commerce, and consumer behavior, particularly with younger audiences, is expected to help Tapestry deepen digital engagement and accelerate growth. This appointment aligns with Tapestry's strategy to leverage technology and innovation for its global lifestyle and accessories brands like Coach and Kate Spade New York.

feed.title: Wells Fargo pledges $6M to Charlotte nonprofits
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has committed $6 million to six Charlotte nonprofits focused on housing, workforce training, and small business growth in Charlotte’s westside. This initiative adds to over $48 million the bank has contributed to philanthropic efforts in Charlotte between 2020 and 2025. The grants aim to support coordinated, community-driven solutions, with beneficiaries including Freedom Communities, Lakeview Neighborhood Alliance, CodePath, CLT Alliance Foundation, ASPIRE Community Capital, and West Boulevard Neighborhood Coalition.

feed.title: Michigan wins NCAA basketball title, Huntington Bank partnership in same day
feed.summary: Columbus-based Huntington Bank has become the official consumer bank of the University of Michigan, a significant partnership announced on the same day the Wolverines won their second NCAA men's basketball national championship. Huntington Bank, which has a strong presence in Michigan through previous acquisitions, also serves as the official consumer bank for other major universities like Ohio State and the University of Minnesota. This new agreement further expands its reach within the collegiate sports landscape.

feed.title: [6-K] Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. Current Report (Foreign Issuer) | WPM SEC Filing - Form 6-K
feed.summary: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. filed a Form 6-K Current Report with the United States Securities and Exchange Commission for the month of April 2026. This filing, incorporated by reference into several of the registrant's registration statements, includes an Annual Report as Exhibit 99.1. The report was signed by Curt Bernardi, Executive Vice President, Strategy and General Counsel, on April 7, 2026.

feed.title: SCWorx announces 1-for-15 reverse stock split to address Nasdaq compliance
feed.summary: SCWorx Corp. has announced a 1-for-15 reverse stock split, effective April 10, 2026, to combine every 15 shares of its common stock into one. This action is intended to help the company regain compliance with Nasdaq’s minimum bid price rule of $1.00 per share. However, SCWorx noted there is no guarantee this will prevent potential delisting from the Nasdaq Stock Market.

feed.title: Clorox Closes GOJO Acquisition, Strengthens Position in Hygiene Solutions
feed.summary: The Clorox Company announced the completion of its acquisition of GOJO Industries, bringing the Purell brand and other health and hygiene solutions into Clorox's portfolio. This strategic move aims to combine complementary strengths in consumer brand building and B2B capabilities, creating broader product offerings and both near- and long-term value. The GOJO business will now operate as Clorox Purell, maintaining its headquarters and facilities in Ohio.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Adjusts P&C Targets, Cuts Brown & Brown (BRO) to $70
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for Brown & Brown (BRO) to $70 from $76, maintaining an Equal Weight rating, as part of its Q1 earnings preview for the property and casualty insurance sector. The firm anticipates solid underwriting across the sector but expects this strength to be tempered by continued pricing softening. This follows a similar action by Barclays, which also cut its price target for Brown & Brown, citing fears of AI-driven disruption but viewing the recent selloff as overdone.

feed.title: Waystar Announces Industry's First AI Solution Addressing Silent Denials from Payer Payment Take-Backs
feed.summary: Waystar has launched the healthcare industry's first AI-powered solution aimed at identifying and recovering over $40 billion in provider revenue lost annually due to "silent denials" or payer recoupments. This new tool, leveraging Waystar AltitudeAI and extensive proprietary data, provides comprehensive visibility into previously undetected revenue loss, significantly reducing reconciliation time and enabling providers to appeal unjustified payment take-backs. An early adopter health system, for example, identified $32 million in hidden recoupments, demonstrating the solution's potential to mitigate substantial write-offs and administrative burdens.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Inc stock: Why it's drawing investor attention now
feed.summary: T-Mobile US Inc continues to lead the U.S. wireless market with strong growth and innovative strategies, drawing significant investor attention. Its core business model, driven by an expansive 5G network and customer-focused innovations, positions it as a market leader. Analysts view T-Mobile positively due to its growth trajectory, attractive valuation, and robust financial health, despite potential risks from regulatory scrutiny and competition.

feed.title: Toothpaste Buyers Could Cash In After $2.9M Settlement: Here's How
feed.summary: Tom's of Maine has agreed to a $2.9 million settlement following a class-action lawsuit alleging deceptive practices in its toothpaste manufacturing and marketing. Customers who purchased Tom's toothpaste between November 21, 2020, and March 6, 2026, are eligible to file a claim. Payouts can range from the average retail price for one product without proof of purchase, to a full refund for up to three products with proof.

feed.title: +4.92% for Palo Alto Networks stock as Anthropic AI project names the company cybersecurity partner
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock surged 4.92% after being named a cybersecurity partner for Anthropic's AI initiative, reflecting strong demand for its AI-powered security platform. The company reported 33% YoY growth in Next-Generation Security recurring revenue and saw insider buying from CEO Nikesh Arora, despite some mixed technical signals and long-term bearish pressure. Analysts anticipate consolidation between $166.00 and $174.00 in the coming week, with a breakout above $174.00 potentially signaling renewed bullish momentum.

feed.title: TeraWulf Inc Soars On AI Pivot And Bullish Call
feed.summary: TeraWulf Inc (WULF) shares are surging due to its successful pivot from Bitcoin mining to high-performance computing and AI infrastructure, reportedly backed by a $12.8 billion pipeline of contracted AI data-center revenue from Google. The stock is also benefiting from a broader rally in cryptocurrency mining and a bullish Buy rating with a $30 price target from Arete Research. These factors highlight confidence in the company's new AI-focused strategy.

feed.title: UBS Group Cuts Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) Price Target to $98.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has lowered its price target for Colgate-Palmolive (NYSE:CL) to $98.00 from $100.00 but maintained a "buy" rating, suggesting a significant upside. Despite recent insider stock sales, large institutions have increased their holdings, with approximately 80% of the stock institutionally owned. The company recently reported strong earnings, beating analyst estimates for both EPS and revenue.

feed.title: Clorox (NYSE:CLX) Price Target Cut to $110.00 by Analysts at UBS Group
feed.summary: UBS Group has cut its price target for Clorox (NYSE:CLX) to $110.00 from $121.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating on the stock. This adjustment implies a potential upside of 6.80% from its previous closing price. The company recently reported Q1 EPS of $1.39, missing analyst estimates, and the stock traded down 1.8% to $102.99.

feed.title: Cisco and Quest Alliance Are Modernizing Vocational Training for India's Next-Gen Workforce
feed.summary: Cisco and Quest Alliance are partnering to modernize vocational training in India, focusing on Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs). Their collaboration, through the Future Right Skills Network (FRSN), aims to strengthen institutions, build capacity among trainers, and integrate tech-fueled career development tools. This initiative has significantly increased earning potential and employability for ITI students, while also influencing national policy to embed future-ready skills, including AI literacy, across India's vocational education system.

feed.title: Costco tests checkout that could take under 10 seconds
feed.summary: Costco is piloting automated pay stations designed to significantly speed up the checkout process, aiming for transactions under 10 seconds. This innovation involves employees pre-scanning items while customers wait in line, allowing for quick payment upon reaching the register. The initiative primarily serves to enhance customer satisfaction, crucial for membership retention which is a significant profit driver for Costco.

feed.title: WisdomTree Voya Yield Enhanced USD Universal Bond Fund (UNIY) Dividend Yield 2026 & History
feed.summary: This article provides details on the WisdomTree Voya Yield Enhanced USD Universal Bond Fund (UNIY), including its current dividend yield of 4.91% and an annual dividend of $2.38 per share. It outlines the fund's recent dividend payments and historical data, comparing its performance to general Finance and NASDAQ companies. The article also includes a detailed dividend history table, frequently asked questions about UNIY's dividends, and related investment resources.

feed.title: Paste a post into this AI tool to check for racial hate speech
feed.summary: WPP, through its agency Ogilvy, has launched "Fair Play," an AI-powered platform designed to identify and refer cases of online racial hate speech. Developed in partnership with the Public Prosecutor's Office of the Federal District and Territories, the tool allows users to submit text for analysis and facilitates direct referrals to authorities without requiring legal expertise. This initiative aims to combat the growing issue of online racism by making the reporting process more accessible to the public.

feed.title: STB rules for Norfolk Southern in dispute with CSX at Port of Virginia
feed.summary: The Surface Transportation Board (STB) has issued a ruling favoring Norfolk Southern in its dispute with CSX concerning access to port terminals. This decision maintains Norfolk Southern's exclusive direct access to Norfolk International Terminals, preserving the existing competitive landscape. The ruling prevents CSX from gaining direct access, which would have altered the current setup at the Port of Virginia.

feed.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) CEO Says Company Ready to Scale Production of Weight-Loss Pill
feed.summary: Eli Lilly's CEO, Dave Ricks, announced the company is prepared to massively scale production and distribution of its newly approved weight-loss pill, Foundayo, to meet anticipated global demand. Following FDA approval, Eli Lilly expects regulatory approvals in over 40 countries this year. Foundayo is poised to be more appealing than injectable alternatives, and Wall Street analysts currently give LLY stock a consensus Strong Buy rating.

feed.title: Williams, Henry Schein, and 3 Other Bargain Stocks From a Veteran Value Fund Manager
feed.summary: A veteran value fund manager has identified several bargain stocks, including Williams and Henry Schein, amidst a volatile market. Value stocks have outperformed growth stocks this year, with the Vanguard Value ETF up 3.3% while the Vanguard Growth ETF has fallen 9.5%. This article highlights opportunities for investors seeking reasonably priced growth stocks.

feed.title: Wells Fargo invests $6 million in nonprofits aimed at driving growth in west Charlotte
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has announced a $6 million grant to six nonprofit organizations in west Charlotte. This investment aims to drive growth in the area by supporting housing access, workforce development, and local businesses. The initiative is part of Wells Fargo's broader commitment to economic growth and community development in Charlotte, with over $48 million invested in philanthropic initiatives in the region since 2020.

feed.title: Global Payments stock hits 52-week low at $62.68
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. (GPN) stock has dropped to a 52-week low of $62.68, marking a significant decline over the past year. Despite recent positive Q4 2025 earnings and some raised price targets by analysts, concerns about valuation and market pressures have led to a downgrade from Raymond James and continued scrutiny from investors. InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be undervalued, offering deeper insights into its financial health.

feed.title: SCWorx (NASDAQ: WORX) enacts 1-for-15 reverse split to meet Nasdaq bid rule
feed.summary: SCWorx Corp. has approved a 1-for-15 reverse stock split to become effective on April 10, 2026, aiming to regain compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price rule of $1.00 per share. This action combines every 15 outstanding shares into one, mechanically increasing the per-share price. However, the company explicitly states there is no assurance that this step will successfully restore compliance, and failure to do so could lead to delisting from Nasdaq.

feed.title: Desjardins Cuts TELUS (TSE:T) Price Target to C$21.50
feed.summary: Desjardins has lowered its price target for TELUS (TSE:T) to C$21.50 from C$23.00, while maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential 23% upside. Several other brokerage firms have also trimmed their targets or downgraded TELUS, resulting in a MarketBeat consensus rating of "Hold" with a C$21.00 price target. The stock is currently trading around C$17.46, below analyst targets, and the company exhibits high leverage with a debt-to-equity ratio of approximately 199.42.

feed.title: TFI International (TSE:TFII) Price Target Raised to C$144.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for TFI International (TSE:TFII) to C$144.00, maintaining a "buy" rating, although this new target still suggests a potential downside from its current share price. Other analysts, including Desjardins, Scotiabank, and National Bank, have also increased their price targets, leading to a MarketBeat consensus rating of "Moderate Buy" with a C$156.00 target. The company recently reported C$1.50 EPS and C$2.51 billion in revenue for its latest quarter, and is a transportation and logistics company organized into four segments.
